scripts.predeploy: cross-env GITHUB_PAGES=true npm run build && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('out/.nojekyll', '')"
scripts.deploy: npx gh-pages-clean && (npx gh-pages -d out --dotfiles || npx gh-pages -d out --dotfiles || npx gh-pages -d out --dotfiles)
scripts.postdeploy: echo 'Deploy complete: published to gh-pages branch'
